description:
Recto: Summaries of legal documents in Arabic script. There are at least seven legal records of sale, and one deed of acknowledgment (iqrār) at the top. Unsigned. The last object of sale is a donkey. A ninth entry was also begun, with only the word "ishtarā" preserved, which tells that the document is a draft. 

Verso: Rhymed strophes of a Hebrew liturgical poem (FGP)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
